content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp:
    28	// Token type mapping from ANTLR to clang format
    29	std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
    30	  { "Int", "int" },
    31	  { "Identifier", "identifier" },
    32	  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
    33	  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
    34	  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },
    35	  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },
    36	  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
    37	  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },
    38	  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },
    39	  { "Return", "return" },
    40	  { "Semi", "semi" },
    41	  { "EOF", "eof" },

    45	  { "Minus", "minus" },
    46	  { "Star", "star" },
    47	  { "Slash", "slash" },
    48	  { "Percent", "percent" },
